name: Linen Oversized Blazer
description: A relaxed-fit blazer crafted from premium linen blend. Features gold-tone buttons, notched lapels, and a single-button closure. Effortlessly transitions from workwear to weekend.

name: Silk Midi Dress
description: A fluid black midi dress in luxurious silk-charmeuse. The bias-cut silhouette drapes elegantly and moves beautifully. Minimal and timeless — a wardrobe essential.

name: Tailored Wide-Leg Trousers
description: High-waisted wide-leg trousers in a breathable ivory crepe. A clean, structured silhouette that pairs beautifully with fitted tops or oversized knitwear.

name: Structured Camel Coat
description: A heritage-style double-breasted coat in warm camel wool. Features a belted waist and classic lapels — an iconic outerwear piece built to last seasons.

name: Primavera Slip Dress
description: Inspired by the warmth of spring, this champagne-colored slip dress features a delicate cowl neck and adjustable straps. Lightweight satin fabric, effortlessly elegant.

name: Editorial Combo Set
description: A coordinated two-piece set featuring an editorial printed blazer and matching trousers. Statement fashion for the bold and expressive. Limited edition.
